title: So I picked up the worm
titleEnglish: So I picked up the worm
synopsis: Far away from her hometown, the little fox has begun her life in the big city. The monotonous days make her homesick but she realizes she’s the only one who can help her find the answers. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Grey Zone
synopsis: Lumps of clay fall into the grey space. The white clay turns into a man, the black clay into a monster. The two lose their flesh every time they move so they start a battle to stay alive. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: A Break in the Clouds
synopsis: The children awake to the sound of their parents arguing. Their conduct is affected little by little in response to the adults’ daily behavior. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: fruits
synopsis: At some point, children diverge from the ideal path set forth for them by adults. The trigger is usually a trivial incident. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: The On-hold Music of Terror
synopsis: "You're right. There was a bug–I killed it." Late at night, only one voice wafts around the room. What lies on the other end of the telephone line is anyone's guess... (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Ghost
tags.description: Prominently features a character who is a ghost.

title: The depths of us
synopsis: My older brother and I became separated on a mountain crawling with eerie insects. I was taught that family should stay together no matter what, so I climbed deep into the mountain in search of my brother. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: While You Sleep
synopsis: On the night of the blue moonlight, the girl has a magical dream. She meets a mushroom fairy who takes her to their festival. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Kagirinaki Rakuen
synopsis: An 8mm animation that was produced by Harada during his high school years.

tags.name: Politics
tags.description: Centers around politics, politicians, or government activities.

tags.name: Philosophy
tags.description: Relating or devoted to the study of the fundamental nature of knowledge, reality, and existence.

tags.name: Class Struggle
tags.description: Contains conflict born between the different social classes. Generally between an dominant elite and a suffering oppressed group.

tags.name: Coming of Age
tags.description: Centers around a character's transition from childhood to adulthood.

tags.name: Bullying
tags.description: Prominently features the use of force for intimidation, often in a school setting.

tags.name: Suicide
tags.description: The act or an instance of taking or attempting to take one's own life voluntarily and intentionally.

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

title: Happy Bogeys
synopsis: A twelve-episodic short film series about mysterious, handsome and funny creatures.

title: My Hand, Her Hand
titleRomaji: Haha no Te, Musume no Kami
synopsis: The little girl has a complex because she doesn’t look like her mom, and the mom wants her daughter to look more ladylike. Their faces don’t look alike, but their hands do. The girl treasures this resemblance, which also enables the mom to treat her daughter with tenderness.

title: On the way home
synopsis: The borderland between sleeping and waking is the moment when the daughter melds into her father.

title: ash time
synopsis: The short film is Hirotoshi Iwasaki's first animated work. The motif is memories of his dog, which lived 17 years.

title: Gintama on Theater 2D: Baragaki-hen
titleNative: 銀魂オンシアター2D バラガキ篇
synopsis: Theatrical cut of the Thorny Arc (episodes 244-247) featuring extra footage. The movie is a part of the "Gintama 20th Anniversary Project".

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

title: Watashi no Oshi wa Akuyaku Reijou.: Rae to Claire ni Ichimon Ittou
titleRomaji: Watashi no Oshi wa Akuyaku Reijou.: Rae to Claire ni Ichimon Ittou
titleNative: 私の推しは悪役令嬢。 レイとクレアに一問一答
synonyms: Watashi no Oshi wa Akuyaku Reijou. Mini Anime
私の推しは悪役令嬢。ミニアニメ
I'm in Love with the Villainess Mini Anime
わたおし ミニアニメ
synopsis: Mini anime of Watashi no Oshi wa Akuyaku Reijou. posted on the KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE YouTube channel and the anime's official Twitter.

tags.name: Medieval
tags.description: Partially or completely set in the Middle Ages or a Middle Ages-inspired setting. Commonly features elements such as European castles and knights.

tags.name: Chibi
tags.description: Features "super deformed" character designs with smaller, rounder proportions and a cute look.

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

tags.name: Yuri
tags.description: Prominently features romance between two females, not inherently sexual. Also known as Girls' Love.

title: Zegapain STA
synonyms: ゼーガペイン オルタモーダ編
synopsis: Sequel to the 2006 Zegapain TV series as part of "Zegapain PROJECT REUNION". The new sequel installment has the subtitle "Olta Moda Arc", named after the brand new force in the Zegapain universe "Olta Moda".

title: The Diary of Ochibi-san
synopsis: "I can help you laugh, but I can't take away the tears you've shed." In Mametsubu-cho, a town somewhere in the ancient Japanese city of Kamakura, Ochibi-san lives a relaxed, easy life. With his friend Nazeni the dog, Jack the naughty kitten, and Pankui the hungry dog, Ochibi-san's year in Mametsubu-cho is filled with encounters and new discoveries! Flower-viewing in spring, swimming in summer, collecting leaves in fall, and eating yummy food in winter. (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.description: Centers around hiking, camping or other outdoor activities.

title: Iron Pulse
synopsis: A small family-owned iron factory was closed down. What will remain of it? (Source: Geidai Animation)
